zh.lifeSummary: 當John Vardry於大約1645年出生在英國素福爾可德本哈姆時，他的父親Samuel Vawdrey48歲，母親Anne Markham34歲。他於1671年與Elizabeth Cage結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1721年1月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Vardry于大约1645年出生在英国素福爾可德本哈姆时，他的父亲Samuel Vawdrey48岁，母亲Anne Markham34岁。他于1671年与Elizabeth Cage结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1721年1月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰查爾斯享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vardry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Nir, Hagit, Itzik, Moshe, Yehoshua.
English: nickname from Middle English fair(e), vair ‘fair, beautiful’ (see Fair ) + dai ‘day’, perhaps used as a farewell expression.
Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew vardi ‘of rose’, translating any of the many Ashkenazic surnames beginning with Rosen-.

variants.name: Fair
meanings: English: nickname meaning ‘handsome, beautiful, fair’, Middle English fair, fayr, Old English fæger. The word was also occasionally used as a personal name in Middle English, applied to both men and women.

Irish: translation into English of Gaelic fionn ‘fair’, which Woulfe describes as a ‘descriptive epithet that supplanted the real surname’, or a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac F(h)inn, a variant of Mag Fhinn (see McGinn ).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1658: Charles, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Charles, Maryland, United States

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When John Vardry was born about 1645, in Debenham, Suffolk, England, his father, Samuel Vawdrey, was 48 and his mother, Anne Markham, was 34. He married Elizabeth Cage in 1671. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 10 January 1721, in Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Vardry est né environ 1645, à Debenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Samuel Vawdrey, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Anne Markham, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cage en 1671. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1721, à Charles, Maryland, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Vardry um 1645 in Debenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Vawdrey 48 und seine Mutter Anne Markham 34. Er hat 1671 Elizabeth Cage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1721 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Cage nel 1671. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1721, nel Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Vardry(이)가 대략 1645년 영국 수폴크 데벤함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Vawdrey(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Markham(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1671년 Elizabeth Cage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1721년 1월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 찰스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Vardry nasceu aproximadamente 1645, em Debenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Samuel Vawdrey, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Anne Markham, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cage em 1671. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1721, em Charles, Maryland, British Colonial America, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Vardry родился около 1645 г. в местности дебенам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Samuel Vawdrey было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Markham, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cage в 1671 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 января 1721 г. в местности чарльс, Мэриленд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 77 лет.
